name: ExtensionDevice_Property_Value
title: R5: Value of the property additional types
description: R5: `Device.property.value[x]` additional types (string, boolean, integer, Range, Attachment)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Device.property.value[x]` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Device.property.value[x]` 1..1 `Attachment, boolean, CodeableConcept, integer, Quantity, Range, string`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Device.property.value[x]` 1..1 `Attachment, boolean, CodeableConcept, integer, Quantity, Range, string`
*  R4B: `Device.property.valueQuantity` 0..* `Quantity`
*  R4: `Device.property.valueQuantity` 0..* `Quantity`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Device.property.value[x]` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Device.property.valueQuantity` as `RelatedTo`.
Element `Device.property.value[x]` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Device.property.valueCode` as `RelatedTo`.
The mappings for `Device.property.value[x]` do not cover the following types: Attachment, boolean, integer, Range, string.

element.short: R5: Value of the property additional types
element.definition: R5: `Device.property.value[x]` additional types (string, boolean, integer, Range, Attachment)
element.comment:
Element `Device.property.value[x]` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Device.property.valueQuantity` as `RelatedTo`.
Element `Device.property.value[x]` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Device.property.valueCode` as `RelatedTo`.
The mappings for `Device.property.value[x]` do not cover the following types: Attachment, boolean, integer, Range, string.
The text element in CodeableConcept.text is used for properties which would usually be coded (such as the size of an implant, or a security classification) but for which there is not currently an appropriate concept in the vocabulary (e.g. a custom implant size, or a security classification which depends on configuration). Otherwise the string choice type is used for descriptive properties, or instructions.

element.definition: The value of the property specified by the associated property.type code.
element.comment: The text element in CodeableConcept.text is used for properties which would usually be coded (such as the size of an implant, or a security classification) but for which there is not currently an appropriate concept in the vocabulary (e.g. a custom implant size, or a security classification which depends on configuration). Otherwise the string choice type is used for descriptive properties, or instructions.
